synopsis: This Fan Disc gathers two of the most popular episodes and re-edits them to create a single story. These episodes are "Chibitaria" and "America's Storehouse Cleaning". The unaired episode "Ore-sama Nikki" is also included.

title: Legendary Brave Swordsman Yaiba
titleNative: 剣勇伝説YAIBA
synopsis: Kurogane Yaiba is a boy who doesn't want to become what any regular kid would: He wants to be a samurai. That's why he undergoes a hard training with his father, knowing only the forest as his world. Then, one day, he is sent to Japan, where he has to deal with a whole new civilized reality, meeting the Mine family, the evil Onimaru and even the legendary Musashi, having lots of dangerous adventures, becoming stronger everyday. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Ajimu: Kaigan Monogatari
titleNative: あじむ ～海岸物語～
synopsis: Seventeen year old Nakaido Hirosuke is just your average high school student. One morning as he arrives at the train station on his way to school, he catches sight of a beautiful girl, Ajimu Yasuna, and immediately falls for her. The two of them get to know each other and become friends, but he can't confess his feelings and she is unsure of hers. As events and other people present obstacles for the potential couple to clear, their relationship begins to develop and their feelings become clear. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Lupin the 3rd: Napoleon's Dictionary
titleRomaji: Lupin III: Napoleon no Jisho wo Ubae
titleNative: ルパン三世『ナポレオンの辞書を奪え』
synonyms: Rupan Sansei: Napoleon no Jisho wo Ubae
Edgar de la Cambriole : Le Dictionnaire de Napoléon
Lupin III - Ruba il dizionario di Napoleone!
Lupin III - Il tesoro degli avi
synopsis: The secret of the Lupin family treasure is out: its location is written inside a dictionary once owned by Napoleon Bonaparte himself! When the dictionary turns up as the prize for a historic motor car race, the notorious Lupin the Third and his criminal cadre race the world's superpowers to win - or steal - the Dictionary and unearth his grandfather's legacy of riches! (Source: Discotek Media)

title: Mahoromatic Summer Special
titleNative: まほろまてぃっく 夏のTVスペシャル
synopsis: It's another normal day in the Misato residence when Mahoro finds yet another pornographic magazine in Suguru's room. This prompts her and Minawa to make a pact with Chizuko, Rin, Miyuki and Miss Shikijo to search and confiscate all of the perverted stash in the house. Suguru, Kiyomi and Toshiya must do whatever it takes to protect their treasure from the girls. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: 91 Daze
titleNative: 91 Daze
synopsis: 91 Daze is a series of shorts included in various disk packages. They focus around Angelo, Nero, and sometimes Corteo in various comedic situations. (Source: 91 Days Wikia)

tags.name: Mafia

title: Love Between Fairy and Devil
titleNative: 苍兰诀
synopsis: The ancient demon, Dongfang Qingcang, who has been suppressed for a thousand years, comes back to the three worlds and starts a war between immortals and demons the moment he is reborn. In order to get out, the demon lord swaps souls with the immortal Lanhua, who has difficulty controlling her magic power, and accidentally kills her immortal body. In desperation, the two embarked on a journey to find a new body. Along the way, the two experienced all sorts of things, fighting and joking, and Lanhua started to develop feelings for Dongfang Qingcang, but little does she know that all this time, Dongfang QingCang only used her as a tool to resurrect the ancient god of war Chidi, and under the calm a larger conspiracy is also quietly carried out (Source: iQ)

title: Marmalade Boy Movie
titleNative: ママレード・ボーイ (1995)
synopsis: A prelude to Marmalade Boy the TV series. Yuu remembers the day when his parents decided to divorce each other and remarry with another married couple. Toubled by the news, Yuu decides to take a walk, on which he spots a girl he falls in love with at first sight. He decides to follow this unaware girl and falls more in love with her. However he discovers who the girl really is...she's the daughter of his parents' new lovers. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Detective Opera Milky Holmes: Summer Special
titleRomaji: Tantei Opera Milky Holmes: Summer Special
titleEnglish: Detective Opera Milky Holmes: Summer Special
titleNative: 探偵オペラ ミルキィホームズ サマー・スペシャル
synopsis: A special program of Tantei Opera Milky Holmes produced by the staff of the TV series. After some pushing by Irene and her father and a lack of support otherwise, Kokoro stubbornly quits her job as a police detective to become an idol. She soon finds the idol life draining and starts to miss her old detective life. When Henriette notices Sherlock's loneliness without her, she stages a statue theft in order to convince Kokoro to return to the force. (Source: AniDB)

title: Project A-Ko 2: The Plot of the Daitokuji Financial Group
titleRomaji: PROJECT A-KO 2: Daitokuji Zaibatsu no Inbou
titleEnglish: Project A-Ko 2: The Plot of the Daitokuji Financial Group
titleNative: PROJECT A-KO 2 大徳寺財閥の陰謀
synonyms: Project A-Ko 2: Plot of the Daitokuji Financial Group
synopsis: Three weeks after the incident that left Captain Napolipolita's ship balancing on top of Graviton City, A-Ko and the gang go on summer vacation. While A-Ko ponders losing some weight and B-Ko devises another plan to defeat her redheaded rival to win C-Ko, Napolipolita and Spy-D experience severe homesickness - begging for a way to return to their home planet. Meanwhile, Hikari Daitokuji - B-Ko's father and the CEO of the Daitokuji Financial Group - arms the local military with new mecha to attack Napolipolita's ship and obtain its advanced technology. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Lupin the 3rd: The Pursuit of Harimao's Treasure
titleRomaji: Lupin III: Harimao no Zaiho wo oe!!
titleEnglish: Lupin the 3rd: The Pursuit of Harimao's Treasure
titleNative: ルパン三世『ハリマオの財宝を追え!!』
synonyms: Rupan Sansei: Harimao no Zaiho wo oe!!
Lupin III: The Pursuit of Harimao's Treasure
lupin III: all'inseguimento del tesoro di Harimao
synopsis: The infamous bandit Harimao hid a treasure, and to retrieve it, Lupin and the gang must gather three lost statues. When the Nazi-like group Neo-Himmel make a run for the goods, Lupin reluctantly partners with the aging "double-O" MI-6 agent Sir Archer and his granddaughter Diana to gather he statues first. Can this unorthodox team bond well enough to see this mission through? Find out in the Pursuit of Harimao's Treasure! (Source: Discotek Media)

titleNative: HAPPY☆LESSON ADVANCE
synopsis: Hitotose Chitose is now living together with his 5 teachers as his mothers when a mysterious girl appears and becomes their neighbor which turns out that that person is Nagatsuki Kuron who wants Mu-chan to be her mother so another sibling rivalry ensues as to who would end up as Mu-chan's child. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Lupin the 3rd: Missed By A Dollar
titleEnglish: Lupin the 3rd: Missed By A Dollar
titleNative: ルパン三世 1$マネーウォーズ
synonyms: Lupin III: Missed by a Dollar
Lupin III - Per un dollaro in più
synopsis: Lupin swipes a ring from a New York auction, and Zenigata is hot on his trail... along with a gun-toting, former-KGB brute named Nabikov. Nabikov's boss is Cynthia, the lady in charge of the BOW: Bank of the World. Cynthia knows the ring is actually a guide to the location of a fantastic brooch once worn by conquerors of years past. The brooch, it is said, gave them special powers to become more than mere men and women, and make their marks on history. Can Lupin and his cohorts find the brooch before Cynthia uses it to make her own mark with bloody, international war? (Source: Discotek Media)

title: Lupin the 3rd: The Secret of Twilight Gemini
titleEnglish: Lupin the 3rd: The Secret of Twilight Gemini
titleNative: ルパン三世『トワイライト☆ジェミニの秘密』
synonyms: Rupan Sansei: Twilight Gemini no Himitsu
Lupin III: The Secret of Twilight Gemini
Lupin III - Il segreto del Diamante Penombra
Lupin III - Una cascata di diamanti
synopsis: The Twilight diamond's rock-solid secret is about to be cracked. As Lupin's mentor Don Dolune Lies on his deathbed, he hands the master thief a gift: the diamond named Twilight. But it's only half of the treasure-the other half of the Twilight can be found in Morocco. But it's not as simple as "X marks the spot" when a civil uprising is broiling between two factions in this desert paradise. Lupin must contend with his sometimes-partner Fujiko, his feelings for the gorgeous brunette Lara, and on top of it all, the relentless whip-wielding maniac Sadachiyo. (Source: Discotek Media)

title: Generator Gawl
titleNative: ジェネレイターガウル
synopsis: Ryo, Gawl and Koji are 3 young boys who travel back into the past with only 1 objective: change history. In their time they discover that their country, Kubere, uses genetically enhanced persons called generators as a military tool. These generators are the cause for the Third War which kills most of the human population. Now Koji, Ryo and Gawl are there to change all the events. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Kokoro Toshokan
titleNative: ココロ図書館
synopsis: Kokoro Toshokan, a small library, lies nestled in an unpopulated mountain far away from town. Three sisters, Iina, Aruto and Kokoro, call the library home and run it from day to day. Kokoro is just beginning her adventures at the library. Will she become a full-fledged librarian? Will the remote library ever attract readers? Kokoro tries her best to make her dreams come true at Kokoro Library, a place where miracles can happen. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Outburst Dreamer Boys: It's the Destiny of Those Born as Men
titleRomaji: Chuubyou Gekihatsu Boy: Otoko ni Umareta Shukumei Dakara
titleEnglish: Outburst Dreamer Boys: It's the Destiny of Those Born as Men
titleNative: 厨病激発ボーイ 男に生まれた宿命だから
synopsis: Unaired 12th episode that is included in the fourth home video release. The members of the Hero Club are back in action after their close call with disbandment, and they’ve been tasked with their toughest mission yet! The student council wants them to travel to a distant temple (well, lodge) and assist the guardian (well, caretaker) in his duties. As the club members set off of their quest, Mizuki begins to realize just how accustomed she’s become to her very exciting high school life… (Source: Sentai Filmworks)
